ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the event belongs to */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the event occurred */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the event occurred */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather event (e.g., Heavy Snow, Strong Wind) */,
  "cz_type" TEXT /* Type of the geographical zone affected */,
  "cz_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the geographical zone */,
  "cz_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical zone */,
  "begin_datetime" TEXT /* Begin date and time of the event */,
  "end_datetime" TEXT /* End date and time of the event */,
  "injuries_direct" INTEGER /* Number of direct injuries reported */,
  "injuries_indirect" INTEGER /* Number of indirect injuries reported */,
  "deaths_direct" INTEGER /* Number of direct deaths reported */,
  "deaths_indirect" INTEGER /* Number of indirect deaths reported */,
  "damage_property" REAL /* Property damage estimation */,
  "damage_crops" REAL /* Crop damage estimation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the event data */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the weather event (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the weather event (e.g., active, inactive, resolved) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "event_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the community */,
  "warning_issued" INTEGER /* Indicate if a warning was issued for the event */,
  "emergency_declared" INTEGER /* Indicate if a state of emergency was declared due to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_cz_fips FOREIGN KEY ("cz_fips") REFERENCES geographical_zones ("cz_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_state_fips FOREIGN KEY ("state_fips") REFERENCES states ("fips_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "narrative" TEXT /* Narrative description of the weather episode */,
  "episode_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the episode */,
  "episode_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the episode */,
  "episode_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* State abbreviation (e.g., NH, MA) */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* State capital */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* State population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_zones" (
  "cz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical zone */,
  "cz_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical zone */,
  "cz_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the geographical zone */,
  "cz_type" TEXT /* Type of the geographical zone */,
  "cz_abbreviation" TEXT /* Zone abbreviation */,
  "cz_population" INTEGER /* Zone population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related weather event */,
  "injuries_direct" INTEGER /* Number of direct injuries reported */,
  "injuries_indirect" INTEGER /* Number of indirect injuries reported */,
  "deaths_direct" INTEGER /* Number of direct deaths reported */,
  "deaths_indirect" INTEGER /* Number of indirect deaths reported */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., physical, psychological) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of injury (e.g., minor, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "damage_reports" (
  "damage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each damage report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related weather event */,
  "damage_property" REAL /* Property damage estimation */,
  "damage_crops" REAL /* Crop damage estimation */,
  "damage_type" TEXT /* Type of damage (e.g., property, crop) */,
  "damage_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of damage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("damage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government agency, news outlet) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "narratives" (
  "narrative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each narrative */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated weather event */,
  "event_narrative" TEXT /* Detailed narrative describing the event's impact */,
  "narrative_type" TEXT /* Type of narrative (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "narrative_format" TEXT /* Format of the narrative (e.g., text, multimedia) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("narrative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_narratives_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., image, document) */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_files_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)
